notes:
v2.4.4 Update
✨ Speaking portrait variants: Per-card portrait variants and dynamic portrait image rules can now use their own speaking image while active.
🐛 Generic resource max objects: Bar-style tracked attributes now read object-based max values correctly, including max values exposed as value or derived and configured Max Path values.

v2.4.3 Hotfix
🐛 D&D5e custom Max Path: Tracking bars now respect the Max Path field in D&D5e, so custom counters such as Custom D&D 5e Sanity no longer stay visually full when their value changes.

v2.4.2 Hotfix
🐛 Fixed PF2e Speed sometimes showing as 0 on Foundry V14 / PF2e 8.x.
🐛 Fixed PF2e character sheets failing to open after editing Speed from the HUD.
🐛 Improved PF2e alternate speed handling for fly, climb, swim, and burrow.

v2.4.1 Hotfix
🐛 Fixed config panel crash on PF2e

v2.4.0 Update
📝 Card Quick Notes — write memos on any HUD card (all users)
💥 HP Change Popup — floating damage/healing numbers
👥 Scene Friendly NPCs — auto-display on HUD
🗂️ Actor Groups — save & swap roster selections
🖱️ Quick Roster Management — right-click add/remove
🐛 Fixed item uses (Ki Points, charges) not adjustable via HUD on DnD5e 4.x+

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.4.4
announcement.content:
v2.4.4 updates portrait variants and resource bars.

  • Speaking portrait variants: Per-card portrait variants and dynamic portrait image rules can now use their own speaking image while active.
  • Generic resource max values: Bar-style tracked attributes now read object-based max values correctly, including value, derived, and configured Max Path values.
  • D&D5e custom Max Path: The v2.4.3 fix is also included, so custom counters such as Custom D&D 5e Sanity no longer stay visually full when their value changes.
